[Your Email Address]  
[Your Phone Number]  
[Date]  

[Employer's Name]  
[Company's Name]  
[Company's Address]  
[City, State, ZIP Code]  

Dear [Employer's Name],

I am writing to express my interest in the Talent Acquisition Specialist position within the Human Resources department at [Company's Name], as advertised. My name is Harper Wu, and I have a strong background in recruitment and talent acquisition, making me excited to help the HR department bring in top talent.

Throughout my career, I have honed my skills in identifying and securing exceptional candidates who not only meet but exceed expectations. I am eager to apply these skills at [Company's Name] and contribute to the growth and success of the Human Resources team.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how I can contribute to the continued success of [Company's Name].

Sincerely,

Harper Wu

goldAnswers.Cover Letter: With a strong background in recruitment and talent acquisition, I am excited to help the HR department bring in top talent.
